creator: merlyn500@gmail.com
text:
Hi. Problem is following:
When i "kldunload acpi_video", my system crash - completely. Second time
I tried it, I jumped to debugger and see this output:

/* Output: */

Fatal trap 12: page fault while in kernel mode
cpuid=0; apic id=00
fault virtual address  = 0x10
fault code             = supervisor read, page not present
instruction pointer    = 0x20:0xc0d19a10

frame pointer          = 0x28:0x6295b88
code segment           = base 0x0, limit 0xfffff, type 0x1b
                       = DPL 0, pres 1, def32 1, gran 1
processor eflags       = interrupt enabled, resume, IOPL=0
current process        = 983 (kldunload)
[thread pid 982 tid 100066 ]
Stopped at acpi_video_vo_destroy+0x80: movl 0x10(%eax), %ecx

/* End of output */

I have so 1 hour old current system. (2.3. 2007 18:30). Notebook Prestigio
Nobile 157. My dmesg output is:

When i try kldunload to other module (atapicam, if_iwi, etc.) it don't crash.

I am sorry, if this is "for s*it". When do you anything about this problem
know, of course i will send you some outputs, logs, etc.

Thanks, Milan

How-To-Repeat: kldunload acpi_video
